name: Ninja
description: [Ninja](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1100) is a malware developed in C++ that has been used by [ToddyCat](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1022) to penetrate networks and control remote systems since at least 2020.  [Ninja](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1100) is possibly part of a post exploitation toolkit exclusively used by [ToddyCat](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1022) and allows
